---
title: "Autonomous Flights Made Easy"
id: module-fieldwork
order: 2
summary: "An easy-to-use workflow for controlling ready-to-fly UAVs on autonomous survey missions in highly structured terrain."
module-goals:
  - module-goals-fw
materials:
  - material-fw-7
  - material-fw-8
  - material-fw-6
activities:
  - activity-fw-14
  - activity-fw-11
  - activity-fw-111
  - activity-fw-12
assessments:
  - fw-assessment
labels:
  - Einführung
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/UAVFieldwork/module-UAVfieldwork.md"
title-block-banner: images/uav-fieldwork/fp4.png
title-block-banner-color: black
listing:
  - id: module-module-goals
    contents: "../module-goals/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-fieldwork
      heading: "Goals"

  - id: module-materials
    contents: "../materials/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-fieldwork
      heading: "Materials"

  - id: module-activities
    contents: "../activities/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-fieldwork
      heading: "Activities"

  - id: module-assessments
    contents: "../assessments/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-fieldwork
      heading: "Assessments"
---

This module bundles the processing workflow for creating high-quality outputs from aerial imagery.

::: {#module-module-goals}
:::

::: {#module-materials}
:::

::: {#module-activities}
:::

::: {#module-assessments}
:::
